_comment_servers.jam: Bug capture + dev context (console, network, repro). Jam.dev hosted MCP.
_comment_servers.filesystem: Scoped read/write to repo root and /tmp. Anthropic reference server.
_comment_servers.github: Repo, issues, PRs. GitHub's official server. Token via env var.
_comment_servers.postgres: READ-ONLY query access to the project DB. Community server.
_comment_servers.shadcn: Browse/install shadcn/ui v4 components by natural-language prompt.

_credential_policy: Every credential below is a ${env:VAR} reference. Never inline tokens. The block-secrets.sh hook will reject any commit that does.
